ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxi_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxi company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxi company */,
  "medallion_number" TEXT /* Medallion number of the taxi company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the taxi company */,
  "taxi_type" TEXT /* Type of taxi (e.g., yellow, green) */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the taxi company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the taxi company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the taxi company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the taxi company */,
  "company_fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of taxis in the company's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxi company the driver belongs to */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver (1-5) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES taxi_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough (e.g., Manhattan, Brooklyn) */,
  "borough_population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "borough_area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square miles */,
  "borough_density" REAL /* Population density of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_data" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date of pickup */,
  "pickup_day" INTEGER /* Day of pickup (1-31) */,
  "pickup_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of pickup (0-23) */,
  "pickup_day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of week of pickup (1-7) */,
  "pickup_month" INTEGER /* Month of pickup (1-12) */,
  "pickup_year" INTEGER /* Year of pickup */,
  "dropoff_date" TEXT /* Date of drop-off */,
  "dropoff_day" INTEGER /* Day of drop-off (1-31) */,
  "dropoff_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of drop-off (0-23) */,
  "dropoff_day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of week of drop-off (1-7) */,
  "dropoff_month" INTEGER /* Month of drop-off (1-12) */,
  "dropoff_year" INTEGER /* Year of drop-off */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_locations" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "pickup_latitude_round3" REAL /* Rounded latitude of pickup location */,
  "pickup_longitude_round3" REAL /* Rounded longitude of pickup location */,
  "dropoff_latitude_round3" REAL /* Rounded latitude of drop-off location */,
  "dropoff_longitude_round3" REAL /* Rounded longitude of drop-off location */,
  "pickup_zip_code_round3" TEXT /* Rounded ZIP code of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_zip_code_round3" TEXT /* Rounded ZIP code of the drop-off location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id")
)
